package com.multilanglearner.domain.model

import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable

// 14 supported languages (from main.js LANGUAGES)
data class Language(
    val code: String,
    val name: String,
    val subCode: String,
    val ttsLocale: String
)

val LANGUAGES = listOf(
    Language("en", "英语", "en", "en-US"),
    Language("ja", "日语", "ja", "ja-JP"),
    Language("ko", "韩语", "ko", "ko-KR"),
    Language("ru", "俄语", "ru", "ru-RU"),
    Language("th", "泰语", "th", "th-TH"),
    Language("vi", "越南语", "vi", "vi-VN"),
    Language("ms", "马来语", "ms", "ms-MY"),
    Language("id", "印尼语", "id", "id-ID"),
    Language("ar", "阿拉伯语", "ar", "ar-SA"),
    Language("pt", "葡萄牙语", "pt", "pt-BR"),
    Language("es", "西班牙语", "es", "es-ES"),
    Language("fr", "法语", "fr", "fr-FR"),
    Language("de", "德语", "de", "de-DE"),
    Language("hi", "印地语", "hi", "hi-IN")
)

// VTT subtitle cue
data class SubtitleCue(
    val index: Int,
    val startMs: Long,
    val endMs: Long,
    val text: String,
    val translation: String? = null
)

// Word-level timestamp (from .wordts.json)
@Serializable
data class WordTimestamp(
    val w: String,
    val s: Double,
    val e: Double
)

// AI provider preset (from main.js AI_PROVIDERS)
data class AIProvider(
    val id: String,
    val name: String,
    val defaultBaseUrl: String,
    val defaultModel: String
)

input.new_string:
val AI_PROVIDERS = listOf(
    AIProvider("openai", "OpenAI", "https://api.openai.com/v1", "gpt-4o-mini"),
    AIProvider("claude", "Claude", "https://api.anthropic.com/v1", "claude-sonnet-4-20250514"),
    AIProvider("groq", "Groq", "https://api.groq.com/openai/v1", "llama-3.3-70b-versatile"),
    AIProvider("deepseek", "DeepSeek(深度求索)", "https://api.deepseek.com/v1", "deepseek-chat"),
    AIProvider("qwen", "Qwen(通义千问)", "https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1", "qwen-plus"),
    AIProvider("zhipu", "Zhipu(智谱清言)", "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4", "glm-4-flash"),
    AIProvider("custom", "自定义(OpenAI兼容)", "", "")
)

// AI config (from ai_config.json)
data class AIConfig(
    val provider: String = "deepseek",
    val apiKey: String = "",
    val baseUrl: String = "",
    val model: String = "",
    val maxTokens: Int? = null,
    val temperature: Double? = null,
    val groqWhisperEnabled: Boolean = true,
    val whisperModel: String = "whisper-large-v3",
    val subtitleTranslateMode: String = "none"
)

// Regulation country (from regulations.json)
@Serializable
data class RegulationCountry(
    val code: String,
    val name: String,
    val lang: String,
    val items: List<RegulationItem>
)

@Serializable
data class RegulationItem(
    val id: Long = 0,
    val title: String,
    val content: String,
    val isUser: Boolean = false
)

// Word card display data
data class WordCardData(
    val word: String,
    val phonetic: String = "",
    val translation: String = "",
    val definitions: List<Definition> = emptyList(),
    val examples: List<String> = emptyList()
)

data class Definition(
    val partOfSpeech: String,
    val definition: String
)

// Video info
data class VideoInfo(
    val name: String,
    val videoPath: String,
    val subtitlePath: String? = null
)

// Baidu translate language map (from main.js BAIDU_LANG_MAP)
val BAIDU_LANG_MAP = mapOf(
    "en" to "en", "ja" to "jp", "ko" to "kor", "fr" to "fra",
    "de" to "de", "ru" to "ru", "es" to "spa", "pt" to "pt",
    "it" to "it", "ar" to "ara", "th" to "th", "vi" to "vie",
    "id" to "id", "ms" to "may", "hi" to "hi"
)

// Whisper detected language name to code (from main.js LANG_NAME_TO_CODE)
val LANG_NAME_TO_CODE = mapOf(
    "english" to "en", "japanese" to "ja", "korean" to "ko",
    "russian" to "ru", "thai" to "th", "vietnamese" to "vi",
    "malay" to "ms", "indonesian" to "id", "arabic" to "ar",
    "portuguese" to "pt", "spanish" to "es", "french" to "fr",
    "german" to "de", "hindi" to "hi", "chinese" to "zh"
)

1→package com.multilanglearner.domain.util
     2→
     3→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordTimestamp
     4→
     5→/**
     6→ * Word-level timestamp alignment - ported from main.js generate-subtitle handler.
     7→ * Matches displayed words to API word timestamps using fuzzy matching.
     8→ */
     9→object WordAligner {
    10→    private val CLEAN_REGEX = Regex("[^\\p{L}\\p{M}\\p{N}'-]")
    11→
    12→    /**
    13→     * Find word timestamps for the current subtitle cue.
    14→     * Filters wordTimings to those within the cue's time range,
    15→     * then maps displayed words to API words via fuzzy match.
    16→     */
    17→    fun alignWords(
    18→        displayedWords: List<String>,
    19→        allTimings: List<WordTimestamp>,
    20→        cueStartSec: Double,
    21→        cueEndSec: Double
    22→    ): List<WordTimestamp?> {
    23→        val subWords = allTimings.filter { it.s >= cueStartSec - 0.1 && it.s <= cueEndSec + 0.3 }
    24→        if (subWords.isEmpty()) return List(displayedWords.size) { null }
    25→
    26→        val result = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp?>()
    27→        var wtIdx = 0
    28→        for (dw in displayedWords) {
    29→            val clean = dw.trim().lowercase().replace(CLEAN_REGEX, "")
    30→            var matched: WordTimestamp? = null
    31→            for (k in wtIdx until subWords.size) {
    32→                val wtWord = subWords[k].w.trim().lowercase().replace(CLEAN_REGEX, "")
    33→                if (wtWord == clean || clean.startsWith(wtWord) || wtWord.startsWith(clean)) {
    34→                    matched = subWords[k]
    35→                    wtIdx = k + 1
    36→                    break
    37→                }
    38→            }
    39→            result.add(matched)
    40→        }
    41→        return result
    42→    }
    43→}
    44→

content.text:
All 4 files have been created with the exact content specified:

1. `D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\domain\model\Models.kt` -- Domain models including Language, SubtitleCue, WordTimestamp, AIProvider, AIConfig, RegulationCountry/Item, WordCardData, VideoInfo, plus constant maps (LANGUAGES, AI_PROVIDERS, BAIDU_LANG_MAP, LANG_NAME_TO_CODE).

2. `D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\domain\util\VttParser.kt` -- VTT subtitle parser with YouTube auto-generated subtitle handling (ultra-short entry skipping, dual-line format, consecutive dedup).

3. `D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\domain\util\TextSegmenter.kt` -- TTS text segmenter that splits text into chunks of up to 200 characters at sentence boundaries.

4. `D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\domain\util\WordAligner.kt` -- Word-level timestamp alignment using fuzzy matching between displayed words and API word timestamps.
